summary: Critical bugs: (1) semver regex `^v[0-9]+\.[0-9]+\.[0-9]` lacks terminal `+$`, incorrectly matches v1.2.30 as v1.2.3; (2) glob pattern [^a-z0-9-] should be [!a-z0-9-] in bash (non-standard negation). Test harness hardcodes expected count (1..15), fragile. Workflow structure sound (pinned actions, minimal perms).
